name: Pork Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill pork for about 20 minutes (makes grinding easier).
2. Combine all ingredients except water and egg.
3. Sprinkle mix over the pork.
4. Grind the pork.
5. Add water and egg.
6. Mix in a mixer with flat beater for 1 minute on stir speed.
7. Refrigerate until ready to use.
